case_title: STEPHANIE DEVINS ET AL VS. U-HAUL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANTE ABORDO, MARKETING COMPANY PRESIDENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT U-HAUL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE DEVINS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF YURI PSINAKIS IS PRESENT. ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY DEVINS, STEPHANIE PSINAKIS, YURI AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-05-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-07-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE DEVINS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF YURI PSINAKIS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS TO RE-DO PROOF OF SERVICE TO PROPER AGENT OF SERVICE AS LISTED ON SECRETARY OF STATE WEBSITE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-02-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEVINS, STEPHANIE AS TO DEFENDANT U-HAUL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PSINAKIS, YURI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U-HAUL $7,145.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,145.00, PLAINTIFF STEPHANIE DEVINS IS NOT A PROPER PLAINTIFF AND AS TO HER, CASE IS DISMISSED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
